headline: Citizens Financial Group to Participate at the Barclays 24th Annual Global Financial Services Conference
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., July 06, 2026--Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG) announced today that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bruce Van Saun will participate at the Barclays 24th Annual Global Financial Services Conference on Monday, September 14, 2026 at 10:30 am ET.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Citizens Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst John Pancari   maintains Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $75 to $80.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Citizens Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $76
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Vivek Juneja   maintains Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $68.5 to $76.

headline: Baird Downgrades Citizens Financial Group to Neutral, Announces $72 Price Target
summary: Baird  analyst David George   downgrades Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) from Outperform to Neutral and announces $72 price target.
